creator: nosuzuki@e-mail.ne.jp
text:
I made ppxp port updateing patch. This patch update from ppxp-0.99072807 to ppxp-0.99120923.

This patch file include some patches to the documents written in Japanese and I send you with uuencoded format.
This file also include a patch to use ppxp with Piafs 2.x protocol.
